_comment: C13 Phase-A risk-limits config. These values mirror scripts/live_risk_limits.RiskLimits dataclass defaults; tests/test_live_risk_limits_json_mirror.py enforces they never drift. scripts/run_smc_live_incubation.py loads this file via RiskLimits.from_json() (required to exist for phase=live_small/live_full).
